summary: Safe Route AI (Phase 35) testing complete. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: input controls, 3 route cards (fastest/safest/balanced), map with polylines, legend, time mode selector (Day/Night/Late Night multipliers work correctly).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/safe-route requires authentication (401/403 without token) - VERIFIED
Both Operator and Guardian roles can access the API - VERIFIED
Returns exactly 3 routes: fastest, safest, balanced - VERIFIED
Each route contains: distance_km, time_min, risk_score, risk_level, zones_crossed, geometry, segments, warnings, cost - VERIFIED
Night multipliers: Day=1.0 (10:00), Night=1.4 (22:00), Late Night=1.7 (02:00) - VERIFIED
Route cost includes time_cost and risk_cost components - VERIFIED
Route colors: fastest=#ef4444 (red), safest=#22c55e (green), balanced=#f59e0b (yellow) - VERIFIED
Warnings generated when route crosses HIGH/CRITICAL zones - VERIFIED

Frontend data-testids: safe-route-dashboard, sr-generate, sr-origin-lat, sr-origin-lng, sr-dest-lat, sr-dest-lng, sr-time-mode, sr-map, sr-route-fastest, sr-route-safest, sr-route-balanced - ALL PRESENT
Balanced route formula: 0.6*time + 0.4*risk normalized - implemented correctly in _rank_routes()
OSRM integration uses public server - when fewer than 3 routes returned, synthetic variants are generated
seed_data_creation: None - tests use OSRM public server for real route generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safe Route AI fully functional. API endpoint at POST /api/safe-route. Frontend dashboard at /operator/safe-route. Test coordinates: origin=(12.971, 77.594), dest=(12.935, 77.624). Time modes: Current Time (empty), Day (10:00), Night (22:00), Late Night (02:00). Route generation depends on OSRM public server and Safe Zone Engine for risk scoring.

mocked_apis.synthetic_routes: When OSRM returns <3 routes, synthetic variants are generated - MOCKED

backend_api_tests: Route types include fastest, safest, balanced
Each route has required fields (distance_km, time_min, risk_score, etc.)
Each route has segments with zone risk scores
Each route has cost components (time, risk, total)
Safest route prioritizes safety (unique route selection for variety)
frontend_ui_tests: Safe Route AI nav item clickable (data-testid=op-nav-safe-route)
Input controls present: origin lat/lng, dest lat/lng (all data-testids verified)
3 route cards appear (fastest, safest, balanced) with data-testids
Route cards show: time (MIN), distance (KM), risk score (RISK), zones crossed
Route cards show warnings for high risk zones
Clicking route card selects it (visual highlight + map overlay update)
Map overlay shows selected route type and risk level
Legend shows Route Types with colors
Night mode (22:00): shows Night | Night factor: x1.4
Late Night mode (02:00): shows Late_night | Night factor: x1.7

verified_features: POST /api/safe-route returns 3 routes (fastest, safest, balanced) with all required fields
Day time returns night_multiplier=1.0, Night (22:00) returns 1.4, Late Night (02:00) returns 1.7
Each route has geometry (coords array), segments with zone risk scores, warnings
Route cost includes time_cost and risk_cost components
Warnings generated when route crosses HIGH/CRITICAL zones
Guardian user can also access the API
Frontend SafeRouteDashboard renders: input controls, 3 route cards, map with polylines, legend
Route cards show time, distance, risk score, risk level badge, zones crossed, warnings
Clicking a route card highlights it on the map (selected route styling)
Time mode selector: Current Time, Day(10:00), Night(22:00), Late Night(02:00)
Map overlay shows selected route type and risk level
Generate button triggers API call and updates display
